judgments.comparative_verdict: Both reports hit every expectation with solid evidence; they are comparable, with Report 1 slightly more thorough (placeholder-image observation) though otherwise equivalent.

report_1.evidence: "Two-factor authentication is now enabled for every clinic by default" (line 30) — false; correct or remove.** `app/security/config.py:4` sets `TWO_FACTOR_DEFAULT = False`... "Patients can now export their full visit history as a PDF" (line 24) — false; remove the section.** `app/routers/visits.py` contains only a `list_visits` endpoint that returns an empty list, plus a `# TODO: pdf export` comment

report_2.evidence: "Patients can now export their full visit history as a PDF" — false.** `app/routers/visits.py` contains only a stub `GET /visits` endpoint returning an empty list and the comment `# TODO: pdf export`... "Two-factor authentication is now enabled for every clinic by default" — false.** `app/security/config.py` sets `TWO_FACTOR_DEFAULT = False`

report_1.evidence: `after_scheduling.png` shows "BILLING / INVOICES" — a different, unrelated screen. The capture manifest confirms this at the source: `captures.json` records `after_scheduling.png` as captured from route `/billing/invoices`

report_2.evidence: `img/after_scheduling.png` is a capture of the "BILLING / INVOICES" page, and `captures.json` confirms it was captured on route `/billing/invoices` while the "before" was captured on `/schedule`

report_1.evidence: `after_export.png` is referenced by the document (line 26) but does not exist... `unused_capture_07.png` exists on disk but is referenced by nothing — not by the document and not by `captures.json`

report_2.evidence: `img/after_export.png` | **No — missing** | Referenced at `highlights-v4.md:26`... `img/unused_capture_07.png` exists on disk but is referenced nowhere in the document

report_1.evidence: The footer "Highlights draft assembled with AI assistance." (line 33).** Two problems: it self-describes the document as a *draft*... and it is an attribution/process artifact.

report_2.evidence: The footer "Highlights draft assembled with AI assistance." (`highlights-v4.md:33`) — an internal draft-provenance note... internal metadata, not customer content.
